summary: Repitched version sounds better than the original, though little is known about the show itself
review: The reviewer praises the repitch work, noting that the original recording was a bit chipmunk‑like and the new pitch correction improves listening. With only one moderate (3‑star) rating and no comments on performance, the overall impression is cautiously positive but limited.

ai_rating.rationale: Only a single, moderately positive review; praise focuses solely on pitch correction while no information about musical quality or recording source is provided.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Repitch work appreciated; original sounded overly high‑pitched ('chipmunky'), the corrected version sounds more natural.
